title: Korak 63

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
text = 'Hello Zaira'
custom_key = 'python'

def vigenere(message, key):
    key_index = 0
    alphabet = 'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz'
    encrypted_text = ''

    for char in message.lower():
        # Append space to the message
        if char == ' ':
            encrypted_text += char
        else:
            key_char = key[key_index % len(key)]
            index = alphabet.find(char)
            new_index = (index + offset) % len(alphabet)
            encrypted_text += alphabet[new_index]
    print('plain text:', message)
    print('encrypted text:', encrypted_text)
challengeFiles.seed:
text = 'Hello Zaira'
custom_key = 'python'

def vigenere(message, key):
    key_index = 0
    alphabet = 'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz'
    encrypted_text = ''

    for char in message.lower():
        # Append space to the message
        if char == ' ':
            encrypted_text += char
        else:
            key_char = key[key_index % len(key)]
            index = alphabet.find(char)
            new_index = (index + offset) % len(alphabet)
            encrypted_text += alphabet[new_index]
    print('plain text:', message)
    print('encrypted text:', encrypted_text)

tests.text: Trebalo bi da koristite operator += da dodate 1 na key_index unutar tela else bloka.
Tvoj kod ima neispravnu sintaksu i/ili neispravno poklapanje (matching).

description: Biće vam potrebno povećati broj key_index za sledeći ciklus. Da biste to uradili, nakon linije koju ste dodali i unutar istog dela koda, koristite inkrementalni operater da povećate key_index za jedan.
